title: Smart metering policy framework post 2025
body: "We’re consulting on proposals to set the policy framework for energy suppliers to deliver service improvements by ensuring smart meters operate as they should, and to continue installing smart meters after 31 December 2025, when the existing annual installation targets come to an end.  The consultation seeks views on proposed obligations to:   improve smart meter operations complete the domestic rollout by the end of 2030 submit annual deployment plans   Read our consultation privacy notice. "
